mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products(category_id, name, description, tags, rating, sold, activity_label, original_price, price, stock, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{rating}, #{sold}, #{activityLabel}, #{originalPrice}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: UPDATE products SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_media WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET sold = COALESCE(sold, 0) + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
